name: Metabase
description: Open source business intelligence and analytics platform. Create dashboards and explore data without writing SQL.
summary: Metabase is actively releasing updates across multiple stable branches simultaneously. The current latest stable release is v0.59.6 (Open Source) / v1.59.6 (Enterprise), released on April 9, 2025. A beta release v0.60.0-beta is also available as of March 27, 2025. Both Open Source and Enterprise editions are available as Docker images and JAR downloads; see the full release list at https://github.com/metabase/metabase/releases.

answers.What is the current license?: Open Source edition uses AGPL v3; Enterprise edition uses a commercial license (Metabase Commercial License).
answers.Is the project actively maintained?: Yes — multiple releases across several stable branches were published on April 9, 2025, with a beta for v0.60.0 in late March 2025.
answers.Is there a cloud-hosted version availabl: Yes — Metabase offers a managed cloud (Metabase Cloud) at https://www.metabase.com.
answers.Does it support SSO and SAML authenticat: Yes — SSO and SAML are supported in the Enterprise edition.
answers.What databases/data sources are supporte: Supports a wide range of databases including PostgreSQL, MySQL, BigQuery, Snowflake, Redshift, SQL Server, SQLite, MongoDB, Presto, Druid, Athena, SparkSQL, and more; specific connector details are not listed in this changelog excerpt.

alternatives.name: Redash
alternatives.review: Open source, query-focused, simpler feature set.

alternatives.name: Apache Superset
alternatives.review: Apache-licensed, rich visualisation library, steeper setup curve.

alternatives.name: Grafana
alternatives.review: Primarily metrics/time-series but increasingly used for general BI.

alternatives.name: Hex
alternatives.review: Close source, enterprise focus, AI Analytics Platform for your whole team

alternatives.name: Tableau
alternatives.review: Tableau offers more advanced visualizations and enterprise features but is expensive, proprietary, and not self-hostable in the same open-source sense as Metabase.

alternatives.name: Lightdash
alternatives.review: Lightdash integrates tightly with dbt for a metrics-layer-driven approach, making it more structured than Metabase but requiring dbt adoption as a prerequisite.
